chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P.No.S-216 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-2843/2025 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA-2844/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kunbhar, advocate for petitioners. = 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Petitioners are present along with their counsel. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 by exercising her right of free will. He has placed on record Photostat copy of Affidavit of Free Will and Nikahnama. Petitioner No.1 has reiterated the facts given in the memo of petition as well as affidavit of free will and submits that her relatives being annoyed on their unceremonial marriage causing harassment to them; therefore, they have approached this court seeking protection. Issue notices to Respondents as well as to learned A.A.G. & A.P.G. for 19.11.2025. Meanwhile the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
